verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I stood in the courtroom the judge turn my way It looks like you're guilty now what do you say I spoke up your honor I have no defense But that's when mercy walked in

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Mercy walked in and pleaded my case Called to the stand God's saving grace The blood was presented that covered my sin Forgiven when mercy walked in

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I stood there and wondered how could this be That someone so guilty had just been set free My chains were broken I felt born again The moment that mercy walked in

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The blood was presented that covered my sin forgiven when mercy walked in hmmmm
